Epoxy.description: A basic but strong and hard-setting organic polymer.
Epoxy.flavorText: UDA safety guidelines recommend not breathing in the fumes.

Electronics.description: A modular control unit, adaptable to most I/Os.

Electric_Furnace.description: A laboratory grade arc furnace, smelts basic and advanced materials alike.

Electric_Furnace_Large.description: A laboratory grade arc furnace, smelts basic and advanced materials alike.

Meta_Resource.description: Exotic matter, an impossibility in your hands. Use an Orbital Exchange Interface to send to orbit.
Meta_Resource.flavorText: Previously believed to exist only in the heart of stars, the most common form of exotics, elanthium, has permitted extraordinary leaps in low temperature super conductors and high-density power storage.

Kit_Water_Pump.description: A small, but powerful axial-flow pump useful for creating water networks.

SplineTool_Electricity.description: A tool to help create and connect Electricity networks.

Electric_Dehumidifier.description: Diminishes such health risks as cave sickness, while also seeming to dispel cave worms.
Electric_Dehumidifier.flavorText: Whether cave worms are offended by the sudden aridity it produces, or the high pitched whine, research is yet to confirm.

Electric_Dehumidifier_V2.description: Diminishes such health risks as cave sickness, while also seeming to dispel cave worms.
Electric_Dehumidifier_V2.flavorText: Whether cave worms are offended by the sudden aridity it produces, or the high pitched whine, research is yet to confirm.

Electric_Armour_Bench.description: Powered workbench for advanced textiles production and maintenance.

Masonry_Bench_T4.description: Powered bench for heavy stonework and carving.

Carpentry_Bench_T4.description: Powered workbench and machine tools for advanced woodworking.

Electric_Stove.flavorText: Less explosive than using home made biofuel.

Meta_Stamina_Gel.description: A blend of natural ingredients and highly synthetic stimulants that temporarily slows stamina loss.

Composter_Electric.description: Advanced biofuel unit for accelerated production.
Composter_Electric.flavorText: An upshot of the Climate Emergency was a focus on efficient, sustainable technology that squeezes every ounce of energy from nature.

Deep_Mining_Drill_Electric.description: A convenient drilling device that runs on electricity.

Radar_Electric.description: A portable Exotics detection unit powered by Electricity. Approximate directional arc shown on your map. Attracts animals while active.
Radar_Electric.flavorText: Connect this baby up to a generator and you are good to go.

Extractor_Electric.description: A portable mining unit powered by Electricity, used to extract resources from Exotics deposits.
Extractor_Electric.flavorText: Warning: Exotics extraction is known to aggravate nearby wildlife

Mission_Knife_Lion.description: Exotic infused blade, good for gathering rare meat
Mission_Knife_Lion.flavorText: Sharp with a faint purple glow.

Mission_STYX_D_Research2_Bomb.description: A device used for monitoring the nearby environment.
Mission_STYX_D_Research2_Bomb.flavorText: A hospitable terraspace was the goal..

ExoticsReward_200.description: Exotic matter, an impossibility in your hands. Use an Orbital Exchange Interface to send to orbit.
ExoticsReward_200.flavorText: Previously believed to exist only in the heart of stars, the most common form of exotics, elanthium, has permitted extraordinary leaps in low temperature super conductors and high-density power storage.

Mission_Empty_Enzyme_Storage.description: A container which used to hold stable Enzymes
Mission_Empty_Enzyme_Storage.flavorText: Not a trace of enzymes remain.

Tool_Attachment_Electroshock.description: An attachment that has a chance to inflict Electroshock on hit creatures.
Tool_Attachment_Electroshock.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid weapon at an Alteration Bench.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Economic_1.description: An attachment that increases the durability of your weapon.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Economic_1.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid bow.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Extended_Mag.description: An attachment that increases your ammo capacity and reload speed.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Extended_Mag.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid pistol.

Mission_Communication_Device_T4.description: An upgrade for the C0NT4CT Device that will allow access to encrypted missions.

Exotic_Harvester.description: A machine that harvests volatile raw exotics from trees in volcanic regions.
Exotic_Harvester.flavorText: A new machine for new types of Exotics!

Fish_01_Var2.description: A common freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_01_Var2.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_01_Var4.description: A common freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_01_Var4.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_02_Var3.description: A common freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_02_Var3.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_02_Var4.description: A common freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_02_Var4.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_07_Var4.description: An uncommon freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_07_Var4.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_09_Var3.description: An uncommon freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_09_Var3.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_10.description: A rare freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_10.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_12_Var4.description: An uncommon saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_12_Var4.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_13.description: A rare saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_13.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_13_Var4.description: A rare saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_13_Var4.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_16.description: An extremely rare specimen found only in the Olympus Region. Native to Icarus. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_16.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_17.description: Unique to the Prometheus region, these fish can only be found in the Sulfur Pools of Volcanic areas.
Fish_17.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Explorers_Backpack.description: A handy backpack to help you on your travels.

Equix_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Equix.
Equix_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Elephant_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Elephant.
Elephant_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Equix_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Elephant_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Water_Purifier_T4.description: A water purifier that can refill bottles for you automatically.

Food_Trough_T4.description: A feeder which can create different types of animal gruel depending on what is placed inside.
Food_Trough_T4.flavorText: Takes the pressure out of cooking.

Egg.description: A fresh chicken egg, can be cooked in all manner of ways.

Food_Animal_Feed_Corn.description: A feed that promotes long distance travel.

Exposed_Wall_Light.flavorText: A simple light for your lighting needs.

Exposed_Ceiling_Light.flavorText: A simple light for your lighting needs.

Electric_Oxite_Dissolver.description: Through a process of Electrolysis, oxygen is extracted from water.
Electric_Oxite_Dissolver.flavorText: Fresh air not polluted by poisonous Icarus gasses.

Bunker_Locker.description: A thin locker perfect for storing gear.

Energy_Bar.description: A quickly made snack out of natural ingrediants.

Condensed_Exotics.description: Exotic matter, an impossibility in your hands. Requires Lasers to be Cut into smaller useable pieces.
Condensed_Exotics.flavorText: Previously believed to exist only in the heart of stars, the most common form of exotics, elanthium, has permitted extraordinary leaps in low temperature super conductors and high-density power storage.

ExperimentalGoop.description: The result of a simple experiment.

SonicDevice.description: A sonic device made based on the findings from the Research station.

Ammo_EDS.description: An Enzyme Delivery System - a hard outer case with Enzymes inside. Use with your favourite projectile-firing weapon - pistol, shotgun or rifle.
Ammo_EDS.flavorText: Rapid mutation results in increased creature danger for increased skinning rewards.

Recovery_Beacon_Tracker.description: Emergency Coordination for High-value Objects. Will detect and scan for emergency beacons in the nearby area.

Mission_Enzyme_Propogation_Unit.description: A device which disperses a modified terraforming enzyme into the surrounding environment for creature experimentation

Mission_Enzyme_Propogation_Unit_Craftabl.description: A device which disperses a modified terraforming enzyme into the surrounding environment for creature experimentation

Mission_Enzyme_Propogation_Hub.description: A device which disperses a modified terraforming enzyme into the surrounding environment for creature experimentation

Electric_Fireplace.description: An electric fireplace, suitable for both basic cooking and heating.
Electric_Fireplace.flavorText: On Icarus, fire is both friend and foe.

Electric_Fireplace_Ext.description: Wide metal tubing helps the smoke escape the hearth.
Electric_Fireplace_Ext.flavorText: \'Sometimes it felt like I had joined a rustic interior decoration cult\' - M. Le Baroni

Electric_Fireplace_Cap.description: Vents and extractor fans help clear up any smoke from your shoddily cooked meals.

Prop_Eye_Wash_Station.description: A quick station for when experiments go wrong.

Mission_Examination_Table.description: A Table for Speciments to be Placed and Examined.

Dead_EI_Agent.description: Fallen in the line of duty.

Elephant_Tusk.description: While not the biggest tusk one could find on Icarus, it\'s still a valuable source of bone.
